title: Page - Sections

sub_fields.label: Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. numuri — the Anchor Nav link target.

sub_fields.label: Background Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Full-width hero background image (no overlay or text).

sub_fields.label: Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. numuri — the Anchor Nav link target.

sub_fields.label: Links
sub_fields.name: links
sub_fields.instructions: Anchor links that scroll to a section on this page.

sub_fields.label: Target section ID
sub_fields.name: anchor
sub_fields.instructions: The id of the section to scroll to (without #), e.g. numuri

sub_fields.label: Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. numuri — the Anchor Nav link target.

sub_fields.label: Alignment
sub_fields.name: align
sub_fields.instructions: Text alignment for the whole section (buttons are always centred).

sub_fields.label: Blocks
sub_fields.name: blocks
sub_fields.instructions: Add / remove / reorder blocks. Each block is a Heading, Text or Button.

sub_fields.label: Text
sub_fields.name: text
sub_fields.instructions: Supports lists and bold.

sub_fields.label: Width
sub_fields.name: width
sub_fields.instructions: Narrow = constrained centred column (e.g. opening hours).

sub_fields.label: Hours
sub_fields.name: hours
sub_fields.instructions: One row per opening-hours line.

sub_fields.label: Sub-heading
sub_fields.name: subheading
sub_fields.instructions: Optional bold line above (e.g. Rīta pelde).

sub_fields.label: Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. numuri — the Anchor Nav link target.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Waterfall heading (e.g. Numuri).

sub_fields.label: Rooms
sub_fields.name: rooms
sub_fields.instructions: Pick which rooms to show (drag to order). Leave empty to show all published rooms.

sub_fields.label: Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. galerija — the Anchor Nav link target.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Section heading

sub_fields.label: Categories
sub_fields.name: categories
sub_fields.instructions: Which gallery categories to show as tabs. Each tab shows the 3 newest images from that category.

sub_fields.label: “See more” Button
sub_fields.name: button
sub_fields.instructions: Links to the full gallery page.

sub_fields.label: Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. piedavajumi — the Anchor Nav link target.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Waterfall heading (e.g. Īpašie piedāvājumi).

sub_fields.label: Number of cards
sub_fields.name: count
sub_fields.instructions: How many offers to show (newest first). Leave empty / 0 for all.

sub_fields.label: Background
sub_fields.name: background
sub_fields.instructions: Section background colour.

sub_fields.label: Blocks
sub_fields.name: blocks
sub_fields.instructions: Add / remove / reorder blocks: Title, Text, Gallery, Table or Button.

sub_fields.label: Gallery
sub_fields.name: gallery
sub_fields.instructions: Square images shown in a row.

sub_fields.label: Table rows
sub_fields.name: rows
sub_fields.instructions: One row per line. Col 1 left; Col 2/3 right. Fill Expandable content to make the row open on click (+).

sub_fields.label: Expand type
sub_fields.name: expand_type
sub_fields.instructions: What the row reveals when opened (only if there's content).

sub_fields.label: Expandable text
sub_fields.name: expand
sub_fields.instructions: Free text shown when the row opens.

sub_fields.label: Items
sub_fields.name: expand_items
sub_fields.instructions: Menu-style list: label on the left, price on the right.

sub_fields.label: Image side
sub_fields.name: media_side
sub_fields.instructions: Which side the image sits on (alternate between sections).

sub_fields.label: Images
sub_fields.name: images
sub_fields.instructions: One or more images shown as a slider (dots + swipe).

sub_fields.label: Price
sub_fields.name: price
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. Cena sākot no 45 Eur/h*

sub_fields.label: Footnote
sub_fields.name: note
sub_fields.instructions: Small note under the price (optional).

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Waterfall heading (e.g. Jaunumi).

sub_fields.label: Number of posts
sub_fields.name: count
sub_fields.instructions: How many news items to show (newest first). Leave empty / 0 for all.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Waterfall heading (e.g. Sazinies).

sub_fields.label: Contact details
sub_fields.name: lead_details
sub_fields.instructions: Phone / email under the heading (one per line).

sub_fields.label: Extra contact blocks
sub_fields.name: blocks
sub_fields.instructions: Additional contact blocks (e.g. Spa procedūru speciālists).

sub_fields.label: Gravity Form ID
sub_fields.name: form_id
sub_fields.instructions: The Gravity Forms form ID to show on the right.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Waterfall heading (e.g. Kā pie mums nokļūt?).

sub_fields.label: Map embed code
sub_fields.name: embed
sub_fields.instructions: Paste the Google Maps <iframe> embed code (Google Maps → Share → Embed a map → Copy HTML).

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Waterfall heading (e.g. Dāvanu Karte).

sub_fields.label: Subtitle
sub_fields.name: subtitle
sub_fields.instructions: Short line under the heading (green).

sub_fields.label: Gravity Form ID
sub_fields.name: form_id
sub_fields.instructions: The Gravity Forms form ID to show on the right.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Waterfall heading (e.g. Rezervē).

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional image shown above the booking widget.

sub_fields.label: Shortcode
sub_fields.name: shortcode
sub_fields.instructions: Only allow-listed shortcodes render here: [sirvoy ...] (booking widget) and [gravityform ...]. Anything else is ignored for security.

description: Flexible content layouts for inner content pages (Viesnīca, Restorāns, SPA...).
